heading: Emergency communications
label: 5185 Emergency communications
text: The President is authorized during, or in anticipation of, an emergency or major disaster to establish temporary communications systems and to make such communications available to State and local government officials and other persons as he deems appropriate.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 421 by and is classified to .section 418 of Pub. L. 93–288Pub. L. 100–707section 5188 of this title
